change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value:
Activity # 1.1 Support to the National Congress of the National Association of PLWH in Nepal (NAPN+), Federation of Women living with HIV FWLH), and other related initiatives

	Activity # 1.2 Support in dessiminating and monitoring implementation of NGO code of conduct and adherence to guidelines on minimum standard of CS engagement on HIV response

	Activity # 1.3 Support in capacity development of partners/leaders (including APLF leaders) in:
	a) documenting home-grown good practices
	b) implementation of regional capacity development programme (i.e. ICOMP) and
	c) effective utilisation of National Advocacy Plan on HIV and AIDS

	Activity # 1.4 Support to strengthen media's response on HIV and AIDS (develop/print Manual on HIV/AIDS for media practictioners, training, National Media Conference on AIDS, others)

	Activity # 1.5 Support build civil society networks (i.e. FWLH, NAPN+, Networks of MSM, FSW, IDU, others) or thematic groups in organizational and program management, advocacy, and communication 

	Activity # 1.6 Support to national leadership in the preparation/participation to the 2010 UNGASS High Level Meeting

donor_extensions.donor: Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS

raw_payload.organization__name: Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS

financing.donor: Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS

snapshot.implementing_agency: Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS

en.full: Leadership and resource mobilization for a broadbased HIV response at country, regional and global levels are strengthened.
